dialogos.texto_en: (If I keep lurking in the hallway\n like this, I might be mistaken for a suspicious person\n and get myself thrown out.)
(After all, it is a high-end hotel!\n As if i'd know anything about it!)
(I can't help but worry\n about how Miku was acting earlier.)
(Come to think of it,\n was she avoiding me?)
(And when Ichika tried to invite her out with us,\n she seemed hesitant, almost like she was trying\n to run away from me...)
(Maybe I'm just being paranoid, but...\n I have to talk to Miku and find out what's up.)
(But, if she really is avoiding me,\n she might just reject me if I ask her directly.)
(If that's the case, I have no choice\n but to catch her on her way to dinner\n and pretend it's a coincidence!)
(Nino left earlier. Miku hasn't left yet, huh...)
I'm late.\nDid everyone already head to the restaurant?
(There she is! Here I go!)
Y-yo, Miku!
Huh, Futaro?!
What a coincidence, of all places.\nHahahaha!
We're right in front of my room, though.
R-right! Well, my room is also nearby!
Do you need something?
(What do I say?\n How should I bring this up?)
Don't you have something to tell me?
Not really.
(Ehh...\n she's clearly avoiding eye contact...)
Is that all?\nThen let's go to the restaurant, we're gonna be late.
Okay...
(Alright, it seems like she's not avoiding me...\n Maybe I was just being too paranoid?)
Hey, are you okay?
What do you mean by okay?
(I-I guess that question was too vague to answer!\n It was too unclear!)
Ah-well...\nYou looked tired earlier. I was wondering\nif the change in temperature was affecting you.
Oh, I see.
I'm fine now, I was able to get some rest.
I was surprised by the change in temperature, though.\nIt was a little chilly when we left home,\nbut here in Okinawa it's so warm.
Yeah, it's definitely surprising.\nJapan sure is a big country.
Is that all you wanted to say?\nIf so, let's go to the restaurant.\nEveryone is waiting.
Okay...
(Alright, it seems like she's not avoiding me...\n Maybe I was just being too paranoid?)
(I need to change the subject first.\n It wouldn't be good to go straight to the main topic.)
Would you like to go to the restaurant together?
Together?
Yeah, as in like, I will be escorting you there.
Huh...\nYou're gonna escort me, Futaro?
I know it's not really your thing,\nbut well, you know, we are dating after all.
Okay...\nThen, please...
Yeah, leave it to me!
Ah.
What?
Umm, which restaurant are we going to again?\nThere were a few of them, weren't there?
Teehee!
Sorry...\nThis is my first time in such a big hotel like this one.
Don't worry about it, I'll guide you.
(What's going on...\n it's like the roles have been reversed...)
(Alright, it seems like she's not avoiding me...\n Maybe I was just being too paranoid?)
(There's definetely still some distance between us, right?!)
Hey, Miku?
What?
Um, what kind of Okinawan dishes\ndo you think they'll have?
Let's see... Maybe goya champuru, or something?
Yeah, that's probably it.\nAnd we can probably expect some fresh fish too.
Yeah, that sounds about right.
(There's no mistaking it!\n She's definitely keeping her distance!)
(Why...\n Why is Miku avoiding me like this...)
Hey, what do you think's going on?
There's not much to it.\nIt caught my attention in the lobby,\nbut I think Miku is definitely acting strange.
You're right. Maybe it wasn't just my imagination.
Hmmm.\nIt's kind of concerning, considering it's so early in the trip.
